title: 不思議なオーバーラン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is sent on an errand by her dorm
leader, and takes a train to her destination.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second... Was that the station I was
supposed to get off at?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it passed by without stopping. I'll
have to take a train back in the other direction
now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The next train is an express! That should get
me there the fastest!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, we're going so fast... Wait! Ahhh! We just
went by the station again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond returns from her errand rather
late to find her dorm leader quite concerned
about her.
